name: MSP_paralog_architecture
description: Architecture record for the C. elegans Major Sperm Protein gene family. Each msp gene is ~350 bp coding (single exon, ~125 aa product). Paralog evolution is dominated by recent tandem duplication followed by concerted evolution (gene conversion homogenises sequence). Read-level paralog assignment between near-identical copies requires PSVs in 3' UTR or flanking intergenic sequence.

architecture.internal_structure: Single-exon ~350 bp msp ORFs separated by 500-3000 bp intergenic spacer; chrIV main block plus chrII secondary block; gene conversion maintains >95% identity
